title: RLCraft Structures (not official)
description: A mod that adds the structures of RLCraft, originally for the modpack RLCraft - Reimagined.
body:
A mod that adds the structures of RLCraft, originally for the modpack RLCraft - Reimagined.

![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/P28kOqEl/images/c8b579f378e12360bf5a2cf10c8873d888a81d8c.png)

Depedencies:

- Dungeons Enhanced : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeonsenhanced
- Ice and Fire: Dragons (optional) : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ice-and-fire-dragons
- Quark (optional) : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark
- Structure Gel API : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structure-gel-api
